name: Taelor 7" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN4114 - Brass/Clear - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the taelor wall sconce set. This duo features a sleek 7-inch design, blending iron and glass elements for a contemporary touch. The brass and clear finish adds elegance and refinement to any room. Perfect for enhancing your decor, these sconces deliver both style and function. Whether arranged in a hallway or living area, they cast a soft, inviting glow that complements your interior design. With its versatile look, the taelor wall sconce set of two transforms your space into a sophisticated haven, making a statement in illumination and style.
